recommendation.notes: Enough free memory for a 40M-50M educational run with bf16 and gradient checkpointing.

risks: OOM risk increases with 50M model, DPO reference model, GRPO online generation, and larger context length.
Long runs may be interrupted; use checkpoint last.pt and --resume for pretrain.
Public dataset download may fail; Stage 7 dataset script falls back to local synthetic corpus.
